# mcp-swiss
> Swiss open data MCP server — 68 tools, 20 modules, zero API keys

## What
MCP (Model Context Protocol) server providing Swiss public data to AI assistants.

## Tools (68 across 20 modules)
- Transport: train/bus connections, departures, stations (SBB/PostBus)
- Weather: MeteoSwiss live conditions, history
- Hydrology: river/lake levels and temperatures (BAFU)
- Geodata: geocoding, solar potential, municipalities (swisstopo)
- Companies: business registry search (ZEFIX)
- Holidays: public & school holidays by canton
- Parliament: votes, councillors, sessions
- Avalanche: SLF danger bulletins
- Air Quality: NABEL station measurements
- Swiss Post: postcode lookup, parcel tracking
- Energy: electricity tariffs by municipality (ElCom)
- Statistics: BFS population & demographic data
- SNB Rates: CHF exchange rates, historical
- Recycling: waste collection schedules (OpenERZ)
- News: SRF headlines and search
- Voting: popular vote results
- Dams: federal dam registry
- Hiking: trail closures and alerts
- Real Estate: property prices, rent index
- Traffic: ASTRA counting stations
- Earthquakes: Swiss Seismological Service (SED)

## Install
npx mcp-swiss

## Links
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/mcp-swiss
- GitHub: https://github.com/vikramgorla/mcp-swiss
- Docs: https://github.com/vikramgorla/mcp-swiss/blob/main/docs/tool-specs.md
